content: lalalune: Drove significant architectural improvements and infrastructure stability for the elizaos/eliza repository, most notably through a massive refactor of plugin-lifeops (#8277) and the strategic replacement of BitRouter cloud routing (#8233, #8247). Their work included stabilizing CI/CD pipelines, enhancing developer experience with reliable hot-reload features (#8228), and modularizing functionality by extracting the calendar plugin (#8219). With 14 merged PRs and 67 PR comments, they demonstrated high-impact technical leadership, balancing complex codebase restructuring with a primary focus on bug fixes and system reliability.
